content: Home Products Sensors parametric-filter Die   wafer services parametric-filter Amplifiers parametric-filter Audio, haptics   piezo parametric-filter Clocks   timing parametric-filter Data converters parametric-filter DLP products parametric-filter Interface parametric-filter Isolation parametric-filter Logic   voltage translation parametric-filter Microcontrollers  MCUs    processors parametric-filter Motor drivers parametric-filter Power management parametric-filter RF   microwave parametric-filter Sensors parametric-filter Switches   multiplexers parametric-filter Wireless connectivity Home Products Sensors Sensors Accurately measure the real world parametric-filterView all products From self-driving cars to smart homes, systems are increasingly making decisions based on the world around them. Leverage our portfolio of highly accurate sensors with quick response times to capture the necessary information to enable real-time control and autonomy in a wide range of end equipment. Browse by category Humidity sensors Magnetic sensors mmWave radar sensors Optical sensors Specialty sensors Temperature sensors Advanced sensing technologies for accurate and reliable monitoring, protection and control Our advanced sensing technologies help you design products for a range of applications, from electric vehicles  EVs  to industrial automation. With decades of experience, we offer both discrete and integrated solutions that enable high accuracy, low response times and uncompromising reliability. Learn more about how our sensing integrated circuits  ICs  can make your product visions a reality  arrow-right Sensing technologies Achieve accurate and fast current sensing in every system Whether you need to detect an overcurrent fault, improve system efficiency, or provide closed-loop feedback, TI's large portfolio of current-sensing solutions enables industry-leading accuracy for a range of common-mode voltages and temperatures   without sacrificing system size, complexity or cost. Through decades of experience, we have developed leading-edge current-sensing technology that empowers engineers to achieve maximum system performance, power efficiency and reliability. Learn more about our key product categories for current sensing  arrow-right Current-sensing solutions Low-power, highly accurate cost-optimized magnetic solutions for any system Our magnetic sensing portfolio consists of switches, latches, and single and multiaxis linear and angle sensors for position-sensing applications. These sensors have capabilities such as open or close and on or off detection with switches, rotary encoding with latches, angle sensing with 3D linear sensors, and linear displacement measurement with 1D linear sensors. Through decades of experience, we have developed leading-edge magnetic-sensing technology that empowers engineers to achieve maximum system performance, power efficiency and reliability. Further your understanding of our magnetic sensors with top-notch evaluation tools, reference designs, application notes and simulation tools. Learn more about our key product categories  arrow-right Magnetic sensors Reliable, contactless, magnet-free inductive solutions for any system Our inductive sensor portfolio consists of devices that can offer benefits such as high resolution, low power, external magnetic field immunity, multiple channels, and wide frequency ranges. These devices can be used for a variety of applications including tamper detection, high speed rotational angle sensing, button pressing, incremental encoding, and metal proximity detection. We have developed leading-edge inductive-sensing technology that empowers engineers to achieve maximum system performance, accuracy, and reliability. Further your understanding of our inductive sensors with evaluation tools, reference designs, and application notes. Learn more about our key product categories  arrow-right Inductive sensor AFEs Enhance your system with our ultrasonic sensors for level, proximity and distance measurements Our ultrasonic sensor portfolio consists of devices that can offer benefits such as digital signal processing, configurability, diagnostics, high resolution, high accuracy and time-to-digital conversion. These devices can be used for a variety of applications including liquid level sensing, obstacle avoidance and presence detection. We have developed leading-edge ultrasonic-sensing technology that empowers engineers to achieve maximum system performance, accuracy and reliability. Further your understanding of our ultrasonic sensors with evaluation tools, reference designs, and application notes. Learn more about our key product categories  arrow-right Ultrasonic sensor AFEs Making mmWave radar attainable for new and existing industrial and automotive applications Our broad portfolio of 60GHz and 77GHz radar sensors enables redefined and enhanced existing sensing applications, from low-power simple motion detection to high-end imaging radar. We help solve vision-sensing challenges in automotive and industrial applications across the globe with high-performance sensors that can withstand tough environmental conditions.
